//: Project-scoped MCP servers for the workshop demo. These are real, working configs. Claude Code expands ${VARS} from your shell environment. Secrets (DB password, GitHub token) come from the environment — never hardcode them here, this file is committed to the repo. See .env.example.

filesystem.//: Browse the repo source as a tool, scoped to ./src.

mongodb.//: Official MongoDB MCP server (mongodb/mongodb-mcp-server) via Docker, read-only. Reaches your Dockerized MongoDB via host.docker.internal. Set MDB_MCP_CONNECTION_STRING in your env, e.g. mongodb://host.docker.internal:27017/.

github.//: Official GitHub MCP server (github/github-mcp-server) run via Docker. Reads issues, PRs, repos. Provide a Personal Access Token in GITHUB_TOKEN.
